name: Smallmouth a La Spednik Sauteed Bass Meunier
recipeIngredient: 2 1 1/2-lb. bass, heads and tails removed, skinned
recipeInstructions:
1. Dredge the whole bass or fillets in a mixture of cornmeal, flour, salt, and pepper.
2. Slowly sauté in melted butter over medium heat until well browned on one side.
3. Carefully turn the fish with a spatula and brown the other side.
4. Remove the fish when it has turned opaque to a warm platter.
5. Garnish with parsley.
6. Stir vinegar into the remaining fat and pour over the fish.
